name: scistack-gui
description: Visual pipeline builder for SciStack scientific data processing

scistack.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter with scistack-gui installed. Leave empty to auto-detect from the Python extension.

scistack.debug.description: Start a debugpy listener in the SciStack server process so VS Code can attach and hit breakpoints inside user functions executed by the DAG Run buttons. Use the 'Attach to scistack-gui server' launch config to connect.

scistack.debugPort.description: Port for the debugpy listener when scistack.debug is enabled.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:webview
